---
title: "Figure 2 UMAP Making"
author: "Jonathan Chin Cheong"
date: "2024-10-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
set.seed(123)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/Users/jchincheong/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/Manuscripts/Wound Healing Atlas Paper/Hair Follicle Paper/Figure S1")
```

```{r Load Libaries, echo=FALSE}
#Load Libraries
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratData)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(dplyr)
library(Rfast2)
library(viridis)
library(scCustomize)
library(harmony)
library(khroma)
```

Load Data Sets

```{r Load Data Sets}
alldata = readRDS("/Users/jchincheong/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/scRNA SEQ of wounds/Skin Wound Healing Atlas/2. Integration of Data/RDS files/IntegratedMultimodal_FineCelltypes_102124.rds")

customtheme <- theme(
  plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
   text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),          # center title
  strip.text = element_text(family = "Arial",      # facet labels
                            face   = "bold",
                            size   = 12),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial",    # legend title
                              face   = "bold",
                              size   = 12),
  legend.text  = element_text(family = "Arial",    # legend items
                              face   = "bold",
                              size   = 12)
)




```

```{r Modality Vln Plots Counts Percents Stres Score TF Score}
cols = c("springgreen2", "orange2", "steelblue2")

p <- VlnPlot(alldata, 
             features = c("nFeature_RNA", "percent_mito", "percent_ribo", "TF Percentage", "StressScore1"), 
             cols = cols, 
             group.by = "modality", 
             pt.size = 0,
             ncol = 5)

# Customize the font
p <- p & theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title.x = element_blank()
)

# Display the plot
p

ggsave("QualityControlofModalities.png", height = 3, width = 9.5)
```

```{r Export Cell Counts into Table Format}

alldata = readRDS("/Users/jchincheong/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/Manuscripts/Wound Healing Atlas Paper/Preprocessing/MultimodalAtlas_Integrated_Annotated_012925.rds")

# Count occurrences of each unique value in 'orig.ident'
cell_counts <- table(alldata.1$orig.ident)

# Convert to a data frame
cell_counts_df <- as.data.frame(cell_counts)

# Rename columns for clarity
colnames(cell_counts_df) <- c("Sample", "Cell_Count")

# Save to a CSV file
write.csv(cell_counts_df, file = "cell_counts.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```


```{r Violn Plots by Bathches Counts Mito Percents TF pecent, stress}

DefaultAssay(alldata) ="SCT"

# Customize the font
p <- StackedVlnPlot(alldata, 
             features = c("nFeature_RNA","nCount_RNA" ,"percent_mito", "percent_ribo"), 
             group.by = "orig.ident",colors.ggplot = T, 
             pt.size = 0,
             angle.x = 45)


# Customize the font
p <- p & theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title.x = element_blank()
)

# Display the plot
p

ggsave("QualityControlofSamplesAfterSubsetting.png", height = 6, width = 11)

alldata.1 = readRDS("/Users/jchincheong/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/scRNA SEQ of wounds/Skin Wound Healing Atlas/2. Integration of Data/RDS files/Unintegrated_Unsubset_MergedData_081924.rds")

p <- StackedVlnPlot(alldata.1, 
             features = c("nFeature_RNA","nCount_RNA" ,"percent_mito", "percent_ribo"), 
             group.by = "orig.ident",colors.ggplot = T, 
             pt.size = 0,
             angle.x = 45)


# Customize the font
p <- p & theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title.x = element_blank()
)

# Display the plot
p
ggsave("QualityControlofSamplesUnSubset.png", height = 6, width = 11)

```

Sebcoyte Differentiation Markers Identified in Atlas
```{r Sebocyte Differentiation Trajectory Feature Vln Plots}
FeaturePlot(alldata, c("Pparg","Sdc1","Fasn","Cidea"), reduction = "umap.rpca")

FeaturePlot(alldata, c("Krt14","Krt5","Krt79","Krt10"), reduction = "umap.rpca")

FeaturePlot(alldata, c("Lrig1","Acp5","Slc6a19","Awat1"), reduction = "umap.rpca")

FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata.1,c("Pparg","Krt79","Awat1"), reduction = "umap.rpca",
                    na_cutoff = 0.5, num_columns= 3) & NoAxes()
ggsave("SebocyteDifferentiationFeaturePlots.png", height = 4, width = 11.5)

# Identify keratinocyte cells
keratinocyte_cells <- WhichCells(alldata.1, ident = "Sebocytes")

# Create a DimPlot with custom colors
DimPlot_scCustom(alldata.1, cells.highlight = keratinocyte_cells, cols.highlight = "aquamarine2", raster = F, label = F, shuffle = T, reduction = "umap.rpca") + NoLegend()+ NoAxes() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold", family = "Arial")
  )

# Save the plot to a TIFF file
ggsave("DimPlot_SebocytesColored.png", dpi = 300, height = 5, width = 5)


```



```{r Vln Plot by Sex of Counts Percents TF Percentages Stress}

cols = c("hotpink2", "steelblue", "purple2")

p <- VlnPlot(alldata, 
             features = c("nFeature_RNA", "percent_mito", "percent_ribo", "TF Percentage", "StressScore1"), 
             cols = cols, 
             group.by = "sex", 
             pt.size = 0,
             ncol = 5)

# Customize the font
p <- p & theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 11),
  axis.title.x = element_blank()
)

# Display the plot
p

ggsave("QualityControlofSex.png", height = 3, width = 9.5)
```


```{r Vln Plots Stress Score by Metaclusers}
pal = color("smooth rainbow")
metacluster_pal <- pal(length(levels(alldata$metaclusters)), range = c(0.1,0.9))

# Violin plot for stress score grouped by metacluster
p <- VlnPlot(alldata,"StressScore1", group.by = "metaclusters", 
             pt.size = 0, cols )
  p <- p + theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12)
  )
ggsave("MultimodalAtlas_StressSignatureVlnPlot_MetaclusterNewColors.svg", height = 5, width = 7)


```


```{r Vln Plot Stress Score by Timepoint}

metacluster_pal <- pal(length(levels(alldata$metaclusters)), range = c(0.6,0.9))

# Violin plot for stress score grouped by timepoint
p <- VlnPlot(alldata,"StressScore1", group.by = "timepoint", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = metacluster_pal)
  p <- p + theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12)
  )
ggsave("MultimodalAtlas_StressSignatureVlnPlot_TimepointNewColors.svg", height = 5, width = 6)
```

```{r Vln Plot TF by Metacluster with New Colors}
metacluster_pal <- pal(length(levels(alldata$metaclusters)), range = c(0.1,0.9))

# Violin plot for TF percent grouped by meta cluster
p <- VlnPlot(alldata, "TF Percentage", group.by = "metaclusters", pt.size = 0, cols)   
p <- p + theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_blank(),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  plot.margin = unit(c(1, 1, 1, 1), "cm")  # Add 1 cm margin on all sides
)
ggsave("MultimodalAtlas_TFVlnPlot_MetaclusterNewColor.svg", height = 5, width = 7)


```


```{r Vln Plot TF by Timepoint with New Colors}
metacluster_pal <- pal(length(levels(alldata$metaclusters)), range = c(0.6,0.9))

# Violin plot for stress score grouped by metacluster
p <- VlnPlot(alldata,"TF_Percentage", group.by = "timepoint", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = metacluster_pal)
  p <- p + theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12)
  )
ggsave("MultimodalAtlas_TFVlnPlot_Timepoint.svg", height = 5, width = 6)
```


```{r Making Dim Plots for RPCA Intergrated clusters}

# List of methods to loop through
methods <- c("rpca")

# Main plotting and saving loop
for (method in methods) {
  # Clusters
  cluster_plot <- DimPlot(
    alldata,
    group.by = paste0(method, "_clusters"),
    reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."),
    label = TRUE,
    repel = TRUE,
    raster = FALSE
  ) + NoLegend() + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  ggsave_multidevice(cluster_plot, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Clusterdimplot_", Sys.Date()))

  # Batches
  batch_plot <- DimPlot(
    alldata,
    group.by = "orig.ident",
    reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."),
    raster = FALSE,
    shuffle = TRUE
  ) + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  ggsave_multidevice(batch_plot, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Batchdimplot_", Sys.Date()), width = 12)

  # Modality
  modality_plot <- DimPlot(
    alldata,
    group.by = "modality",
    reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."),
    shuffle = TRUE,
    raster = FALSE
  ) + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  ggsave_multidevice(modality_plot, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Modalitydimplot_", Sys.Date()))

  # Timepoint
  timepoint_plot <- DimPlot(
    alldata,
    group.by = "timepoint",
    reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."),
    shuffle = TRUE,
    raster = FALSE
  ) + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  ggsave_multidevice(timepoint_plot, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Timepointdimplot_", Sys.Date()), width = 10)
  
  # Sex
  sex_plot <- DimPlot(
    alldata,
    group.by = "sex_modality",
    reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."),
    shuffle = TRUE,
    raster = FALSE
  ) + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  ggsave_multidevice(sex_plot, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_SexModalitydimplot_", Sys.Date()))
  
  # Chemistry
  chemistry_plot <- DimPlot(
    alldata,
    group.by = "chemistry",
    reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."),
    shuffle = TRUE,
    raster = FALSE
  ) + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  
  ggsave_multidevice(chemistry_plot, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Chemistrydimplot_", Sys.Date()))
  
  #Repeat plotting without legends 
  # Batches
  batch_plot_nolegend <- batch_plot + NoLegend()
  ggsave_multidevice(batch_plot_nolegend, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Batchdimplot_", Sys.Date(), "NoLegend"))

  # Modality
  modality_plot_nolegend <- modality_plot + NoLegend()
  ggsave_multidevice(modality_plot_nolegend, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Modalitydimplot_", Sys.Date(), "NoLegend"))

  # Timepoint
  timepoint_plot_nolegend <- timepoint_plot + NoLegend()
  ggsave_multidevice(timepoint_plot_nolegend, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Timepointdimplot_", Sys.Date(), "NoLegend"))
  
  # Sex
  sex_plot_nolegend <- sex_plot + NoLegend()
  ggsave_multidevice(sex_plot_nolegend, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Sexdimplot_", Sys.Date(), "NoLegend"))
  
  # Chemistry
  chemistry_plot_nolegend <- chemistry_plot + NoLegend()
  ggsave_multidevice(chemistry_plot_nolegend, paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Chemistrydimplot_", Sys.Date(), "NoLegend"))
}

methods <- c("rpca") #

for(method in methods){
  p <- DimPlot(alldata, group.by = "pca_classif", reduction = paste("umap", method, sep = "."), label = F, repel = T, raster = F) + NoLegend() + NoAxes() + theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA))
  p <- LabelClusters(p, id = "pca_classif", fontface = "bold")
  ggsave_multidevice(plot = p, filename_base = paste0("IntegratedMultimodal_", method, "_Celltypedimplot"), devices = c("svg","png"))
}
```


Make Modalit Plots Split By Time
```{r Make Modalit Plots Split By Time}
cols = c("royalblue4", "turquoise4", "maroon4", "darkgreen", "gold3", "mediumpurple4", "orange3", "darkseagreen4", "orchid4", "magenta4", "tomato3", "grey")
levels(alldata)

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, cols, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, split.by = "modality") & NoLegend() & NoAxes() & customtheme

ggsave("UMAPGlobalSplitByModalites.png", width = 15, height = 7)


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, cols, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F) & NoLegend() & NoAxes() & customtheme

ggsave("UMAPGlobalNewColors.png", width = 7, height = 7, bg = "transparent")

# Define your desired order manually:
new_levels <- c("Unwounded_scRNAseq",     
                "Wounded_D1PW_scRNAseq",  
                "Wounded_D2PW_scRNAseq",  
                "Wounded_D4PW_scRNAseq", 
                "Wounded_D7PW_scRNAseq",  
                "Unwounded_snRNAseq",  
                "Wounded_D4PW_snRNAseq", 
                "Wounded_D7PW_snRNAseq",  
                "Wounded_D15PW_snRNAseq",  
                "Wounded_D30PW_snRNAseq", 
                "Unwounded_CITEseq",      
                "Wounded_D15PW_CITEseq",  
                "Wounded_D30PW_CITEseq")

# Reorder the metadata column
alldata$timepoint_modality <- factor(alldata$timepoint_modality, levels = new_levels)




DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, cols, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, split.by = "timepoint_modality") & NoLegend() & NoAxes()
ggsave("UMAPGlobalSplitByModalitesTimepoint.png", width = 12, height = 15)


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, cols, reduction = "umap.rpca") +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"))

ggsave("UMAPGlobal.png", width = 5, height = 5)
```

```{r Modalit Metacluster distribution shown in bar plot}
cols = c("springgreen2", "orange2", "steelblue2")


ggplot(result_df, aes(x = metaclusters, y = AverageProportion, fill = modality)) +
  geom_bar(
    stat = "identity",
    position = "fill",
    colour = 'black',
    size = 0.5
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(
    x = "Metacluster",
    y = "Average Proportion",
    fill = "Modality"
  ) +
  coord_flip() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format())
ggsave("BarPlotsofModality.png", height = 5, width = 6)
```


```{r Cell count barplots by meta data}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Shorten timepoint labels
Idents(alldata) <- "timepoint"
alldata <- RenameIdents(alldata,
                        "Unwounded" = "UW",
                        "Wounded_D1PW" = "D1PW",
                        "Wounded_D2PW" = "D2PW",
                        "Wounded_D4PW" = "D4PW",
                        "Wounded_D7PW" = "D7PW",
                        "Wounded_D15PW" = "D15PW",
                        "Wounded_D30PW" = "D30PW")
alldata$timepoint <- Idents(alldata)


# Define a custom theme using Arial with larger fonts for reuse
custom_theme <- theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_blank()
)

meta_df <- as.data.frame(alldata@meta.data)
modality_total <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(modality)
timepoint_total <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(timepoint)
sex_total <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(sex)
chemistry_total <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(chemistry)

modality_counts <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(modality, orig.ident)
timepoint_counts <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(timepoint, orig.ident)
sex_counts <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(sex, orig.ident)
chemistry_counts <- meta_df %>% dplyr::count(chemistry, orig.ident)

g1 <- ggplot(alldata@meta.data, aes(x = modality)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Cell Counts by Modality", x = "Modality", y = "Cell Count") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),
        axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank()) +
  custom_theme

plot_total_counts <- function(data, x_var, fill_color, title) {
  ggplot(data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = "n")) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = fill_color, color = "black") +
    labs(title = paste("Total", title), x = x_var, y = "Cell Count") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),
          title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, family = "Arial", hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, family = "Arial", angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, family = "Arial"),
          axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, family = "Arial")) +
    custom_theme
}

plot_mean_counts <- function(data, x_var, fill_color, title) {
  summary_data <- data %>% group_by(.data[[x_var]]) %>% summarise(mean_n = mean(n), sd_n = sd(n), .groups = "drop")
  ggplot(summary_data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = "mean_n")) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = fill_color, color = "black") +
    geom_jitter(data = data, aes_string(x = x_var, y = "n"), width = 0.2, alpha = 0.9, color = "black") +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_n - sd_n, ymax = mean_n + sd_n), width = 0.2) +
    labs(title = paste("Mean", title, "per Batch"), x = x_var, y = "Cell Count") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),
          title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16, family = "Arial", hjust = 0.5),
          axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, family = "Arial", angle = 45, hjust = 1),
          axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, family = "Arial"),
          axis.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 10, family = "Arial")) +
    custom_theme
}

g1_total <- plot_total_counts(modality_total, "modality", "steelblue", "Cell Counts by Modality")
g2_total <- plot_total_counts(timepoint_total, "timepoint", "forestgreen", "Cell Counts by Timepoint")
g3_total <- plot_total_counts(sex_total, "sex", "purple", "Cell Counts by Sex")
g4_total <- plot_total_counts(chemistry_total, "chemistry", "darkorange", "Cell Counts by Chemistry")

g1_mean <- plot_mean_counts(modality_counts, "modality", "steelblue", "Cell Counts by Modality")
g2_mean <- plot_mean_counts(timepoint_counts, "timepoint", "forestgreen", "Cell Counts by Timepoint")
g3_mean <- plot_mean_counts(sex_counts, "sex", "purple", "Cell Counts by Sex")
g4_mean <- plot_mean_counts(chemistry_counts, "chemistry", "darkorange", "Cell Counts by Chemistry")

g1_total; g1_mean
g2_total; g2_mean
g3_total; g3_mean
g4_total; g4_mean

g1_mean + g2_mean + g3_mean + g4_mean & custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "IntegratedMultimodal_MeanCountsbyMetadata", width = 12, height = 11)

g1_mean | g2_mean | g3_mean | g4_mean & custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "IntegratedMultimodal_MeanCountsbyMetadata_long", width = 15, height = 6)

g1_total + g2_total + g3_total + g4_total & custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "IntegratedMultimodal_CountsbyMetadata", width = 12, height = 11)

g1_total | g2_total | g3_total | g4_total & custom_theme
ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "IntegratedMultimodal_CountsbyMetadata_long", width = 15, height = 6)
```

```{r Scatter Plot for nCountRNA/nFeatureRNA by Chemistry}
plot1 <- FeatureScatter(alldata, feature1 = "nCount_RNA", feature2 = "nFeature_RNA", group.by = "chemistry", shuffle = T)
plot1 & custom_theme & NoLegend()
ggsave( "IntegratedMultimodal_PostFilterQC_Scatter.png", height = 5, width = 5)
```

Make histogram plots of nFeature_RNA
```{r nFeature histogram}
ggplot(alldata.1@meta.data, aes(x = nFeature_RNA)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 50, fill = "grey50", color = "grey40") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(200,5000), color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +              # Apply a minimal theme
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA)) +  # Box the plot
  labs(title = "Histogram of nFeature_RNA", x = "nFeature_RNA", y = "Count") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        text = element_text(face = "bold", family = "Arial")) 

ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "IntegratedMultimodal_nFeatureHistogram",  width = 4, height = 4)
```


Make histogram of percent_mito
```{r Percent mito histogram and qc plots}

alldata.1 = readRDS("/Users/jchincheong/SRSP Laboratory Dropbox/SRSP Lab/Resources/Town Square - Data Share/scRNA SEQ of wounds/Skin Wound Healing Atlas/2. Integration of Data/RDS files/Unintegrated_Unsubset_MergedData_081924.rds")


ggplot(alldata.1@meta.data, aes(x = percent_mito)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, fill = "grey50", color = "grey40") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(15), color = "red") +
  theme_minimal() +              # Apply a minimal theme
  theme(panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA)) +  # Box the plot
  labs(title = "Histogram of Mitochondrial %", x = "% mito", y = "Count") +
  theme(plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", color = NA),
        text = element_text(face = "bold", family = "Arial")) &custom_theme

ggsave_multidevice(filename_base = "IntegratedMultimodal_PercentMitoHistogram",  width = 4, height = 4)
```

```{r}
alldata.5 = readRDS("PublicOnlyData02242025.rds")

levels(alldata.5) <- c("Keratinocytes",
                       "Sebocytes",
                       "Fibroblasts",
                       "Immune Cells",
                       "Endothleial",
                       "Pericytes",
                       "Skeletal Muscle")


features = c("Krt14","Itga6", #Keratincoytes Labels
             "Krt15","Sox9",
             "Pparg", #Sebocytes
             "Col1a2","Pdgfra", #Fibroblast Markers
             "Ptprc", # Immune Cell Markers
             "Pecam1", #Endothelial Cell Markers
                          "Rgs5", #Pericytes
             "Mylpf", "Des", # Muscle Markers
                          "Mpz", #Schwann Cell Markers
             "Mlana", #Melanocyte Marker
             "Adipoq", #Adipocyte Markers
             "Hba-a1","Hbb-bt" #RBC marker
)



DotPlot(alldata.5, features, dot.scale = 7) + RotatedAxis()



p <- DotPlot(alldata.5, features, dot.scale = 7, cols = "RdYlBu") + 
  RotatedAxis() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold", family = "Arial")
  ) +
  scale_size(range = c(0, 7)) + # Ensures size consistency
  geom_point(aes(size = pct.exp), shape = 21, color = "black") # Outlines circles in black

# Display the plot
p

ggsave("DotPlotPubluicOnlyyIntergrationAcrossCellTypesNew.png",dpi = 300,height = 6, width =7.3 )

```

```{r}
cols = c("royalblue4", "turquoise4", "maroon4", "darkgreen", "gold3", "mediumpurple4", "orange3", "darkseagreen4", "orchid4", "magenta4", "tomato3", "grey")
levels(alldata.5)


# Define your desired order manually:
new_levels <- c("Unwounded",     
                "Wounded_DPW1",  
                "Wounded_DPW2",  
                "Wounded_DPW4", 
                "Wounded_DPW7")

# Reorder the metadata column
alldata.5$timepoint <- factor(alldata.5$timepoint, levels = new_levels)


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata.5, cols, label = F, split.by = "timepoint",num_columns = 5, reduction = "umap.harmony") & NoLegend() & NoAxes() & customtheme
ggsave("UMAPPublicOnltSplitByTimepoint.png", width = 14, height = 3, bg = "transparent")



DimPlot_scCustom(alldata.5, cols, reduction = "umap.harmony", label = F) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & NoLegend() & customtheme

ggsave("UMAPPublicOnlyUMAP.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata.5, cols, reduction = "umap.harmony", label = F) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & customtheme

ggsave("UMAPPublicOnlyWithLedgend.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")
```

```{r}
cols = c("royalblue4", "turquoise4", "maroon4", "darkgreen", "gold3", "mediumpurple4", "orange3", "darkseagreen4", "orchid4", "magenta4", "tomato3", "red2")
cols <- c("royalblue2", "turquoise2", "coral2", "springgreen2", "gold2", "mediumpurple2", "orange2", "darkseagreen2", "orchid2", "magenta2", "plum3", "skyblue2")

Idents(alldata) <- alldata$cca_clusters

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & NoLegend() & customtheme & NoAxes()

ggsave("UMAPRPCAIntergrationClusters.png", dpi = 300 ,bg = "transparent", height = 5, width = 5 )

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & customtheme & NoAxes()

ggsave("UMAPRPCAIntergrationClustersOnlyLedgend.png", dpi = 300 ,bg = "transparent", height = 5, width = 5 )

```



```{r} 
Idents(alldata) <- alldata$sctype_customDB
skinsctype.list = levels(alldata)

DimPlot(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = T )


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & NoLegend() & customtheme & NoAxes()

ggsave("UMAPSCtypeSkindatabaselabels.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & customtheme & NoAxes()


ggsave("UMAPSCtypeSkindatabaselabels.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

Idents(alldata) <- alldata$sctype_defaultDB
sctype.list = levels(alldata)

DimPlot(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = T )


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & NoLegend() & customtheme & NoAxes()

ggsave("UMAPSCtypeDeafaultlabels.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & customtheme & NoAxes()


ggsave("UMAPSCtypeDefaultdatabaselabelsLedgendOnly.png", width = 10, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

Idents(alldata) <- alldata$gptcelltype
gptcell.list = levels(alldata)
DimPlot(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = T )


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & NoLegend() & customtheme & NoAxes()

ggsave("UMAPGPTCellTypelabels.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & customtheme & NoAxes()


ggsave("UMAPGPTCellTypelabelsLegendOnly.png", width = 10, height = 5, bg = "transparent")


Idents(alldata) <- alldata$singleR
singler.list = levels(alldata)
DimPlot(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = T )


DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & NoLegend() & customtheme & NoAxes()

ggsave("UMAPSingleRlabels.png", width = 5, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

DimPlot_scCustom(alldata, reduction = "umap.rpca", label = F, ggplot_default_colors = T) +
  theme(legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),
        legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold")) & customtheme & NoAxes()


ggsave("UMAPSingleRLegendOnly.png", width = 10, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

library(ggVennDiagram)

x <- list(A=sctype.list,
          B=skinsctype.list,
          C=gptcell.list,
          D=singler.list)

g = ggVennDiagram(x, edge_size = 2, label_size = 5, label_alpha = 0) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "white", high = "royalblue2") &
  theme(text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"))
ggsave("VenndiagramofAnnotationLabels.png", plot = g, width = 6, height = 6, bg = "transparent")

```

```{r}
DefaultAssay(alldata) <- "ADT"
#Normalize the protein data for each layer individually - first split the layers and then normalize
alldata[["ADT"]] <- split(alldata[["ADT"]], f = alldata$orig.ident)
alldata <- NormalizeData(alldata, assay = "ADT", normalization.method = "CLR", margin = 2)
#Rejoin the layers of the object before plotting expression
alldata <- JoinLayers(alldata)
alldata <- ScaleData(alldata, assay = "ADT")

rownames(alldata[["ADT"]])

p1 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "CD49f", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 2, colors_use = viridis_light_high) & NoAxes() #Epithelial Cells
p2 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "CD45", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 0.7,colors_use = viridis_light_high) & NoAxes() #Immune Cells
p3 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Ly.6A-E", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 0.7, colors_use = viridis_light_high) & NoAxes() #Firboblasts
p4 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "CD31", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 0.5, colors_use = viridis_light_high) & NoAxes() #Endothelial Cells
p5 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "CD9", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 0.5, colors_use = viridis_light_high) & NoAxes() #SchWann Cells

p6 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Itga6", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 1) & NoAxes() #Epithelial Cells
p7 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Ptprc", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 1) & NoAxes() #Immune Cells
p8 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Ly6a", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 1) & NoAxes() #Firboblasts
p9 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Pecam1", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 1) & NoAxes() #Endothelial Cells
p10 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Mpz", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 1) & NoAxes()


g = plot_grid(p1, p2, p3, p4, p5,p6,p7,p8,p9,p10,nrow = 2)


ggsave("CITEseqCellTypeMarkersRPCAIntergrationWithRNA.png", plot = g, width = 25, height = 10, bg = "transparent")



```







```{r}
# Define male- and female-specific gene sets
male_genes <- c("Ddx3y", "Kdm5d", "Uty", "Eif1ay", "Zfy", "Rps4y1")
female_genes <- c("Tsix","Xist")

# Calculate module scores for male and female gene sets
alldata <- AddModuleScore(alldata, features = list(male_genes), name = "Male_Score")
alldata <- AddModuleScore(alldata, features = list(female_genes), name = "Female_Score")
alldata$sex <- factor(alldata$sex, levels = c("Male", "Female", "Mixed"))


p1 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Male_Score1", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 0.3, split.by = "sex") & customtheme & NoAxes()
p2 = FeaturePlot_scCustom(alldata, "Female_Score1", reduction = "umap.rpca", na_cutoff = 0.5,split.by = "sex" ) & customtheme & NoAxes()


p1
ggsave("UMAPSexScoringLayoutMaleScore.png", width = 15, height = 5, bg = "transparent")


p2
ggsave("UMAPSexScoringLayoutFemaleScore.png", width = 15, height = 5, bg = "transparent")


VlnPlot(alldata, "Female_Score1", pt.size = 0, group.by = "sex")
VlnPlot(alldata, "Male_Score1", pt.size = 0, group.by = "sex")

p1 = VlnPlot(alldata, "Female_Score1", pt.size = 0, cols) + NoLegend()
p2 = VlnPlot(alldata, "Male_Score1", pt.size = 0, cols) + NoLegend()
p1 + p2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2)

ggsave("VlnPlotSexScoreByCellType.png", width = 10, height = 5, bg = "transparent")

VlnPlot(alldata, "Male_Score1", pt.size = 0, group.by = "sex")

VlnPlot(alldata, female_genes,group.by = "sex", pt.size = 1)

```

```{r Making Feature Scatter Plots}
p <- FeatureScatter(alldata, feature1 = "nFeature_RNA", feature2 = "nCount_RNA", group.by = "chemistry", raster = FALSE) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(color = chemistry))  # Adds linear regression lines
library(ggplot2)

# Extract data from Seurat object
plot_data <- FetchData(alldata, vars = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "chemistry"))

# Create ggplot manually
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nFeature_RNA, y = nCount_RNA, color = chemistry)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE) +
  theme_minimal()

p

```
```{r Making Feature Scatter Plots}
library(ggplot2)
 # Ensures Arial font is available

# Extract data from Seurat object
plot_data <- FetchData(alldata, vars = c("nFeature_RNA", "nCount_RNA", "chemistry"))

# Create ggplot manually
p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = nFeature_RNA, y = nCount_RNA, color = chemistry)) +
  geom_point() +
  # Black outline for regression lines
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, aes(group = chemistry), color = "black", size = 1.4) +  
  # Actual regression lines on top
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, size = 1) +  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", size = 12, face = "bold"),  # Arial, 12, bold
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold")
  ) + NoLegend()

print(p)

ggsave("QualityControlScatterPlotFeaturesCounts.png", height = 5, width = 5)

ggsave("QualityControlScatterPlotFeaturesCountsLedgendOnly.png", height = 5, width = 5)

```

```{r Average of Stress Score Normalized to Unwounded}

# Convert table to data frame
df <- as.data.frame(table(alldata$StressScore1, alldata$timepoint))

# Rename columns for clarity
colnames(df) <- c("StressScore1", "Timepoint", "Count")

# Convert StressScore1 to numeric
df$StressScore1 <- as.numeric(as.character(df$StressScore1))

# Filter rows where Unwounded == 1
unwounded_df <- subset(df, Timepoint == "Unwounded")

# Calculate the mean of StressScore1 for Unwounded == 1
mean_unwounded <- mean(unwounded_df$StressScore1)

# Print result
print(mean_unwounded)


# Subtract the mean from all values in stressscore1
alldata@meta.data$StressScore2<- (alldata@meta.data$StressScore1- mean_unwounded)/mean_unwounded

pal = color("smooth rainbow")
metacluster_pal <-pal(length(levels(alldata$metaclusters)), range = c(0.6,0.9))


# Violin plot for stress score grouped by timepoint
p <- VlnPlot(alldata,"StressScore2", group.by = "timepoint", 
             pt.size = 0, cols = metacluster_pal)
  p <- p + theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
    axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_blank(),
    legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
    legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12)
  )

ggsave("MultimodalAtlas_StressSignatureVlnPlot_NoramlizedTimepointNewColors.png", height = 5, width = 6)

VlnPlot(alldata, "StressScore2" ,group.by = "timepoint_modality", pt.size = 0) + NoLegend()
ggsave("MultimodalAtlas_StressSignatureVlnPlot_NoramlizedTimepointModality.png", height = 5, width = 10)
```


```{r Cell count barplots by annotation strategies}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Shorten timepoint labels

Idents(alldata) <- alldata$singleR


# Define a custom theme using Arial with larger fonts for reuse
custom_theme <- theme(
  text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 14),
  axis.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  legend.text = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  legend.title = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 12),
  axis.title.x = element_blank()
)

meta_df <- as.data.frame(table(alldata$sctype_defaultDB))


g1 <- ggplot(meta_df, aes(x = Var1, y = Freq)) +   
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "cornflowerblue", color = "black") +   
  labs(title = "scType Default", x = "Cell Labels", y = "Cell Count") +   
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1),  # Slanted x-axis labels
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +   
  custom_theme

g1

meta_df <- as.data.frame(table(alldata$gptcelltype))


g2 <- ggplot(meta_df, aes(x = Var1, y = Freq)) +   
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "cornflowerblue", color = "black") +   
  labs(title = "GPTCellType", x = "Cell Labels", y = "Cell Count") +   
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1),  # Slanted x-axis labels
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +   
  custom_theme


meta_df <- as.data.frame(table(alldata$sctype_customDB))


g3 <- ggplot(meta_df, aes(x = Var1, y = Freq)) +   
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "cornflowerblue", color = "black") +   
  labs(title = "ScType Skin", x = "Cell Labels", y = "Cell Count") +   
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1),  # Slanted x-axis labels
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +   
  custom_theme


meta_df <- as.data.frame(table(alldata$singleR))


g4 <- ggplot(meta_df, aes(x = Var1, y = Freq)) +   
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", fill = "cornflowerblue", color = "black") +   
  labs(title = "SingleR", x = "Cell Labels", y = "Cell Count") +   
  theme_minimal() +   
  theme(
    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill = NA),        
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "bold", angle = 45, hjust = 1),  # Slanted x-axis labels
    axis.title.x = element_blank()
  ) +   
  custom_theme


g1+g2+g3+g4+ncol(2)

ggsave("QuantificationofAnnotationLabelsCellCounts.png", width = 15, height = 10)

```


```{r Making Bar Plot of Cell Counts and Sex }

View(alldata@meta.data)

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# Extract metadata from Seurat object
meta <- alldata@meta.data

# Make sure relevant columns exist:
# orig.ident, sex, modality
head(meta)

counts_summary <- meta %>%
  group_by(orig.ident, sex, modality) %>%
  summarise(cell_count = n()) %>%
  ungroup()


ggplot(counts_summary, aes(x = orig.ident, y = cell_count, fill = sex)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(), color = "black") + 
  facet_wrap(~ modality, scales = "free_x") +  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Female" = "violetred2",
    "Mixed" = "mediumpurple2",
    "Male" = "royalblue2"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Cell counts per orig.ident colored by Sex, grouped by Modality",
    x = "Orig Ident",
    y = "Cell Count",
    fill = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_ggprism_mod() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
  )


ggsave("cell_counts_by_origident_sex_modality.png", width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```

```{r}
meta <- alldata.1@meta.data

# For counting unique samples per timepoint and sex
sample_summary <- meta %>%
  select(orig.ident, timepoint, sex) %>%
  distinct() %>%               # distinct samples (orig.ident) with their timepoint and sex
  group_by(timepoint, sex) %>%
  summarise(n_samples = n()) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(sample_summary, aes(x = timepoint, y = n_samples, fill = sex)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = position_dodge(), color = "black") +  # add black border
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Female" = "violetred2",
    "Mixed" = "mediumpurple2",
    "Male" = "royalblue2"
  )) +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Samples per Timepoint by Sex",
    x = "Timepoint",
    y = "Number of Samples",
    fill = "Sex"
  ) +
  theme_ggprism_mod() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)
  )

ggsave("cell_samples_by_origident_sex_modality.png", width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)

```
```{r UMAPS}



```
